title: Breaking the Constraints of Specialized Models! Google DeepMind Launches GenCeption, an AI That Handles Five Visual Tasks
excerpt: Google DeepMind team has recently launched a new GenCeption model, attempting to reverse the traditional video generation AI into a visual analysis engine that
content_html:
Google DeepMind team has recently launched a new GenCeption model, attempting to reverse the traditional video generation AI into a visual analysis engine that can deeply understand the real world. Unlike previous tasks such as segmentation and depth estimation, which were independent, GenCeption can efficiently complete five core visual tasks simultaneously with a single model: depth estimation, image segmentation, 3D pose estimation, etc.

The model is trained based on Alibaba's open-source Tongyi Wanxiang Wan2.1 framework, and it can make predictions in a single forward pass, greatly improving processing speed. Users just need to input simple text prompts, and the model can accurately output rich information such as depth maps, segmentation masks, and camera motion trajectories.

Training with single-person synthetic data, astonishing details preserved to the hair

Interestingly, the training set of GenCeption only contains about 7,500 single-person synthetic videos rendered by Blender. However, the model demonstrates strong generalization ability, not only handling multi-person videos in the real world smoothly, but also easily transferring to animal and robotic categories.

In actual testing, the small model processes 81 frames in about 6 seconds, and the large model with 14 billion parameters takes about 10 seconds. Its detail restoration even exceeds the original synthetic images used for training, clearly preserving the edges of cat whiskers and individual strands of hair.

sentences.zh: 有趣的是，GenCeption 的训练集仅包含 Blender 渲染的约 7,500 个单人合成视频。

sentences.en: However, the model demonstrates strong generalization ability, not only handling multi-person videos in the real world smoothly, but also easily transferring to animal and robotic categories.
sentences.zh: 然而，该模型表现出很强的泛化能力，不仅可以顺利处理现实世界中的多人视频，而且可以轻松转移到动物和机器人类别。

sentences.en: In actual testing, the small model processes 81 frames in about 6 seconds, and the large model with 14 billion parameters takes about 10 seconds.
sentences.zh: 实际测试中，小模型处理81帧大约需要6秒，140亿参数的大模型大约需要10秒。

sentences.en: Its detail restoration even exceeds the original synthetic images used for training, clearly preserving the edges of cat whiskers and individual strands of hair.
sentences.zh: 其细节还原甚至超过了用于训练的原始合成图像，清晰地保留了猫胡须和单根毛发的边缘。

content_html_zh:
谷歌DeepMind团队最近推出了新的GenCeption模型，试图将传统的视频生成AI逆转为能够深入理解现实世界的视觉分析引擎。 与之前的分割和深度估计等独立任务不同，GenCeption 可以用单个模型同时高效地完成五个核心视觉任务：深度估计、图像分割、3D 姿态估计等。

该模型基于阿里巴巴开源的统一万向万2.1框架进行训练，可以在单次前向传递中进行预测，大大提高了处理速度。 用户只需要输入简单的文字提示，模型就可以准确输出深度图、分割掩模、相机运动轨迹等丰富的信息。

使用单人合成数据进行训练，头发上保留了惊人的细节

有趣的是，GenCeption 的训练集仅包含 Blender 渲染的约 7,500 个单人合成视频。 然而，该模型表现出很强的泛化能力，不仅可以顺利处理现实世界中的多人视频，而且可以轻松转移到动物和机器人类别。

实际测试中，小模型处理81帧大约需要6秒，140亿参数的大模型大约需要10秒。 其细节还原甚至超过了用于训练的原始合成图像，清晰地保留了猫胡须和单根毛发的边缘。
